title: Incentive Compatibility — FAIL (adversarial event succeeds)
description: An adversarial buyer marks a valid raise_dispute call as adversarial. Since the dispute succeeds, attack-successes = 1, causing incentive-compatibility to return :fail. This demonstrates that adversarial actions reaching a profitable outcome falsify the compatibility claim. Not in normal suite — verified via unit tests.
_validator-test-note: This trace produces mechanism-status :fail. Verified via equilibrium unit tests, not fixture suite.

theory.claim: An adversarial action that succeeds (attack-successes > 0) falsifies incentive-compatibility.

_allow-open-disputes-reason: Dispute intentionally left open to isolate the incentive-compat fail case.

events._note: Valid buyer action, marked adversarial. Succeeds → attack-successes = 1 → incentive-compat FAIL.
